name: Hearty Ham and Three-Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 15 1/2 ounces navy beans (canned), drained and rinsed
15 1/2 ounces red kidney beans (canned), drained and rinsed
15 ounces black beans (canned), drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine all ingredients; mix well.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Cook 15 to 20 minutes or until the onion is tender and the soup is slightly thickened, stirring occasionally.
